title: Development Update: The DeHub Era Starts - Final Updates and Bug Fixes Shipping in Coming Days
html:
The DeHub Era Starts

As we prepare to cut the rope and begin app promotions after years of building, there has never been a more exciting time to be here.

Although we hoped Apple would list us by now, it appears more work is required, so we'll proceed to start on-boarding with the web app and Play Store, leaving the Apple listing as a marketing campaign in itself. We meet all Apple Store terms, so there won't be any issues listing — these are just technical matters we're resolving with Apple support.

The web app and Google Play Store apps are live but currently offer limited functionality, as we had prepared to launch all features together on Apple, Google, and web in February to drive global awareness. The plan is to now ship the latest updates to Google and web in the coming days so we can kick off long-awaited promotions — which will naturally scale up as the Apple listing completes, along with the @LCS_game TGE and when we're firing on all cylinders.

If you're experiencing any log in or posting issues, rest assured we're fully aware and all will be ticking along like clockwork as soon as promotions begin.

Waiting around on markets or perfect products is no longer viable. With the rise of AI and global uncertainty, speed is paramount — moats must be built. It's time to lock in, get vocal, get active and stand when others lay, because we're here to stay.
md:
## The DeHub Era Starts

As we prepare to cut the rope and begin app promotions after years of building, there has never been a more exciting time to be here.

Although we hoped Apple would list us by now, it appears more work is required, so we'll proceed to start on-boarding with the web app and Play Store, leaving the Apple listing as a marketing campaign in itself. We meet all Apple Store terms, so there won't be any issues listing — these are just technical matters we're resolving with Apple support.

The web app and Google Play Store apps are live but currently offer limited functionality, as we had prepared to launch all features together on Apple, Google, and web in February to drive global awareness. The plan is to now ship the latest updates to Google and web in the coming days so we can kick off long-awaited promotions — which will naturally scale up as the Apple listing completes, along with the @LCS_game TGE and when we're firing on all cylinders.

If you're experiencing any log in or posting issues, rest assured we're fully aware and all will be ticking along like clockwork as soon as promotions begin.

Waiting around on markets or perfect products is no longer viable. With the rise of AI and global uncertainty, speed is paramount — moats must be built. It's time to lock in, get vocal, get active and stand when others lay, because we're here to stay.
